description: A customer who pays quarterly wants to switch to a monthly payment plan.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and their current quarterly payment plan.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the customer's account and current billing setup.

nodes.task_description: Explain the new monthly payment amount, including any installment fees.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly communicates the new, smaller monthly payment amount.

nodes.task_description: Update the customer's billing plan from quarterly to monthly.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully changes the payment plan in the system.
